name: DTM
title: HL7 v2 DTM Data Type
description: A date/time value in the format YYYY[MM[DD[HH[MM[SS[.S[S[S[S]]]]]]]]][+/-ZZZZ]. The minimum precision is to the year (4 digits). Additional precision components (month, day, hour, minute, second, fractional seconds) are optional but must appear in order. If a timezone offset (+/-ZZZZ) is present, it indicates the difference between the local time and UTC.

element.definition: A date/time value in the format YYYY[MM[DD[HH[MM[SS[.S[S[S[S]]]]]]]]][+/-ZZZZ]. The minimum precision is to the year. Additional precision components are optional but must appear in order. A timezone offset (+/-ZZZZ) indicates the difference between local time and UTC.
